data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an automatic status upgrade, which is a critical component of the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. Specifically, while the use case describes the automatic upgrade to 'VIP' status, there is no evidence of the system detecting successful referrals or executing the upgrade, leading to a clear gap in requirement fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of the system automatically upgrading customer status based on successful referrals.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
